subject: Re: Waveform Order #71572
customerMessage:
Hello, I have ordered a second way form antenna using Amazon pay yesterday so I don’t see any update on the shipping today. Can you let me know so I can finish my project?

Sent from my iPhone
idealReply:
Hi Clark,

Thanks for reaching out! I understand you are trying to finish your project and want clarity on shipping. Orders can sometimes take 24 to 48 hours to finish processing before the tracking movement appears, especially right after purchase.
I am checking the order status on our side now so we can confirm whether it is still in processing or already moving with the carrier. Once we verify that, I can give you the clearest next step.

If there is anything else you want me to double-check, feel free to reply here.
notes: add a bit more enthusiasm into your reply, and remove excessive language like "lets work through this together"
